description_long: This emergency worker is dressed in a dark brown uniform with black boots and brown straps around the lower legs. The pants are tucked into the boots, which have a sturdy, reinforced appearance suitable for demanding urban environments. The uniform appears to be made of a durable, heavy-duty fabric, likely designed for protection and utility. There are no visible reflective stripes, insignia, or equipment attached to the lower body in these views. The boots have a matte finish and are likely constructed from leather or synthetic material for durability. The overall appearance suggests a practical, functional outfit for emergency response duties.
description: A dark brown-uniformed emergency worker with black boots and brown straps, dressed for urban response tasks. The attire is rugged and functional, with no visible insignia or equipment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brown pants tucked into black boots with brown straps, no visible equipment or insignia.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the boots and the brown straps around the lower legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the boots and pants, with the brown straps clearly visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the boots and the brown straps, similar to the left side.
attribute_uniform_type: Dark brown heavy-duty uniform pants with black, reinforced leather or synthetic boots and brown securing straps around the lower legs. The uniform is practical, with a matte finish and no visible reflective elements or insignia.
